rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §45.206, which governs school district depository contract bidding procedures. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 45.206. BID OR REQUEST FOR PROPOSAL NOTICES; BID AND PROPOSAL FORMS.
_note: Rule text concerns school district depository selection process; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
